title: Everybodys Dating Ollie
description: Hello there! So... do you fancy Ollie? It’s not a requirement to enjoy the show—but it certainly doesn’t hurt. Everybody's Dating Ollie is Ollie’s debut clown/comedy solo show: their ongoing experiment in dating an entire room of people at once. That’s right—sit back, relax, and enjoy as you all collectively go on a date with Ollie. Along the way, you’ll hear about their sexual orientation, relationships, and the all-too-familiar dating patterns we fall into and the relationship escalator that follows. Expect alternative comedy and clown-fuelled chaos, sprinkled with genuinely wholesome moments of connection. Note: There is a topless scene, but no nudity. Join this clown as they dive headfirst into the messy, joyful world of relationships—with you. Bursary Winner 2025: Katie Reddin-Clancy Solo Treasure Hunt.
